message:
chore(engine): formatting, lint suppression, test assertion fixes, and script mode validation

Mechanical cleanup across multiple files:

- control_plane_mock_inventory.rs: Add #[allow(dead_code)] on
  ControlPlaneMockInventoryBundleLock (field is used for Drop side
  effect, not read directly).

- cross_repo_integration_suite.rs: Apply rustfmt to long assert!()
  chains — break method chains across lines per wrapping rules.

- frankenctl_cli.rs: Collapse multi-line .join() into single-line
  out_dir.join("support_bundle/index.json").is_file() per rustfmt.

- rgc_cli_operator_workflow_verification_pack.rs: Fix test assertions
  for JSON fields in the lane script — the script uses nested
  escaped quotes (\\\"key\\\") not plain quotes ("key"), so update
  assertions to match the actual script output.

- RGC_CLI_OPERATOR_WORKFLOW_VERIFICATION_PACK_V1.md: Unwrap
  multi-line paragraph about replay mode onto single line for
  consistent markdown rendering.

- run_cross_repo_integration_suite.sh: Add print_usage() function
  and explicit mode validation (check|test|clippy|ci) with -h/--help
  support at the top of the script, removing the catch-all case from
  the mode dispatch switch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,9 +93,7 @@ bundle replay command:
 
 - `FRANKENCTL_CLI_WORKFLOW_REPLAY_RUN_DIR=artifacts/frankenctl_cli_workflow/<timestamp> ./scripts/e2e/frankenctl_cli_workflow.sh ci`
 
-That explicit replay mode fails closed on incomplete bundles and short-circuits
-before creating a new run directory or requiring `rch`, so operators can replay
-preserved evidence without accidentally rerunning the heavy workflow.
+That explicit replay mode fails closed on incomplete bundles and short-circuits before creating a new run directory or requiring `rch`, so operators can replay preserved evidence without accidentally rerunning the heavy workflow.
 
 ## Required Artifacts

@@ -9,6 +9,24 @@ toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
 target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_cross_repo_integration}"
 artifact_root="${CROSS_REPO_INTEGRATION_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/cross_repo_integration_suite}"
 asupersync_root="${ASUPERSYNC_ROOT:-/dp/asupersync}"
+
+print_usage() {
+  echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]"
+}
+
+case "$mode" in
+  -h|--help)
+    print_usage
+    exit 0
+    ;;
+  check|test|clippy|ci)
+    ;;
+  *)
+    print_usage >&2
+    exit 2
+    ;;
+esac
+
 timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
 run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
 manifest_path="${run_dir}/run_manifest.json"
@@ -195,10 +213,6 @@ run_mode() {
       run_test_mode
       run_clippy_mode
       ;;
-    *)
-      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
-      exit 2
-      ;;
   esac
 
   mode_completed=true
